description_long: This object is a rectangular, industrial-style projector with a robust, matte black metal housing. It features a prominent lens at the front, encased in a slightly protruding frame, and is supported by a sturdy, U-shaped mounting bracket attached at the top with visible adjustment knobs on both sides. The body has subtle ridges and grooves for structural reinforcement and possibly heat dissipation. The mounting bracket is designed for overhead installation, likely for ceiling or truss mounting in urban or commercial environments. The surface is smooth and hard, with a sleek, utilitarian appearance and minimal decorative elements. No visible branding or control panels are present, and the overall design prioritizes durability and functionality.
description: A robust, matte black projector with a prominent front lens and a sturdy overhead mounting bracket, designed for industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular body, mounting bracket, and adjustment knob; lens is not visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large lens and symmetrical mounting bracket; adjustment knobs are visible on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the body, bracket, and adjustment knob; lens is not visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat back of the projector and the mounting bracket; no lens or controls are visible.
